summary: A re-posted vertical selfie/talking-head video of Cudahy, CA Vice Mayor Cynthia Gonzalez speaking to camera, with auto-generated word-by-word caption overlays ('ARE ALL ABOUT TERRITORY', 'UP IN YOUR', 'HELPING OUT'). DHS shares it to condemn her remarks; it is her own raw social clip, not a DHS-produced, music-driven, or genre-styled entertainment piece.
notable_text: Burned-in auto-captions: 'ARE ALL ABOUT TERRITORY', 'UP IN YOUR', 'HELPING OUT'. Tweet condemns the Vice Mayor for allegedly calling on gangs to attack ICE officers.
